comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Seeded champion-history baselines for the four Suco Home Improvement scores that had current champion versions but no championHistory metadata: Appropriate Rebuttal- AI, Income and Name Alignment Metadata AI, Project Timeline AI, and Property Type and Home Value Metadata AI. Full verification now shows 39/39 scores have championVersionId, champion version records, championHistory, and an open current champion-history entry. Also fixed the CLI MCP Tactus score.set_champion handler to serialize ScoreVersion metadata as AWSJSON and include createdAt when setting isFeatured.
